subject: Re: July 7 closing on Jelinek
body:
this was their ida   I don't care if it's september

--- TheStrategyGroup@aol.com wrote:

> Gideon was under the impression that the July 7
> closing deadline might be  at 
> your insistence, rather than the sellers'
> insistence.  Do you have a  reason 
> that the deadline cannot be put off a few days.  I
> ask because David  Kelly 
> just informed me that the title commitment deadline
> we set in the  agreement 
> cannot be met.  Title Commitment will come 3 days
> later than  expected.  Do we 
> have leeway to extend closing deadline to deal with
> delays  in communicating 
> information to our side?
>  
> Please advise what I should tell Gideon.
>  
> Darren
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
this was their ida I don't care if it's september

--- TheStrategyGroup@aol.com wrote:

Gideon was under the impression that the July 7
closing deadline might be at
your insistence, rather than the sellers'
insistence. Do you have a reason
that the deadline cannot be put off a few days. I
ask because David Kelly
just informed me that the title commitment deadline
we set in the agreement
cannot be met. Title Commitment will come 3 days
later than expected. Do we
have leeway to extend closing deadline to deal with
delays in communicating
information to our side?

Please advise what I should tell Gideon.

Darren
